name: M:GTA.World.DrawMarker(GTA.MarkerType,GTA.Math.Vector3,GTA.Math.Vector3,GTA.Math.Vector3,GTA.Math.Vector3,System.Drawing.Color,System.Boolean,System.Boolean,System.Boolean,System.String,System.String,System.Boolean)
summary: Draws a marker in the world, this needs to be done on a per frame basis

params.name: dir
params.description: The direction the marker points in.

params.name: scale
params.description: The amount to scale the marker by.

params.name: textueDict
params.description: Name of texture dictionary to load the texture from, leave null for no texture in the marker.

params.name: textureName
params.description: Name of texture inside the dictionary to load the texture from, leave null for no texture in the marker.
